items.title: 3 Button Chronomancer Condi 31.8k
items.rotation:
Spam Staff 3 + heal to reset Staff 3 off cooldown. Only shatter F2 at 3
              clones.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity mesmer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              I was toiling with this for some time and had to call in some expert Mesmer back up let's say. We came up
              with this.

items.title: 3 Button Chronomancer Power 31.2k Improved Alacrity
items.rotation:
Sword 5 is above Sword 2, cast after an auto attack. Spam F1 shatter off
              cooldown.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity mesmer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              Technically speaking if you have 100% slow uptime from other sources "Danger Time" (middle trait
              Chronomancer) is a greater damage increase (I got around 34.5k running it). However slow is a rarer
              condition and I don't think it is realistic to expect 100% uptime from your team. I don't think it's
              possible to maintain 100% uptime on slow yourself with 3 buttons and do decent damage.

              Also I found Sword 5, Heal, F1 to be equivalent in damage to this. However I preferred this since it's
              less clone reliant and should be better on bosses that move.

              I don't play much mesmer so let me know if you think there is a better way to do this. This is the best I
              found from my exploration.
